name: Cleo State Bank
description_short: Cleo State Bank is the oldest bank in Major County, Oklahoma, chartered in 1900. It operates 4 branches serving Northwest Oklahoma with deposit and loan services.
description_long:
Cleo State Bank was chartered in 1900 and claims the distinction of being the oldest bank in Major County, Oklahoma. The institution has operated continuously for over 100 years, serving individuals and local businesses across Northwest Oklahoma. It is locally owned and operated with a management team that collectively brings over 200 years of combined banking experience to the institution.

The bank offers traditional banking services including deposits, loans, and mobile banking. Customers can access Internet Banking through their online platform, and the bank provides a mobile app available on both Google Play and App Store for convenient account management. All deposits are FDIC-insured, backed by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government. The bank emphasizes that loan products are "made easy" and positioned to help customers find solutions tailored to their specific needs.

Cleo State Bank distinguishes itself as a community-focused, locally-owned institution with deep historical roots in the region. Its board of directors—including Forrest Michael as Chairman, along with John Parker, Lary Weeks, Brad Detrick, and James Fuzzell II—reflects local ownership. The bank maintains 4 physical branch locations across Cleo Springs, Meno, Jet, and Carmen in Major and Alfalfa counties, emphasizing convenient access for customers in rural Northwest Oklahoma.

The bank's website provides limited details about specific loan products, interest rates, fees, or competitive terms. While the focus on community and longevity is clear, prospective customers will need to contact the bank directly or visit a branch for detailed information about deposit rates, loan terms, APRs, and specific service offerings. The mobile app and Internet Banking platform are mentioned but not detailed on the public website. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of the U.S. Government
Over 100 years of continuous operation since 1900 charter
Locally owned and operated by community-focused management
4 convenient branch locations across Major and Alfalfa counties in Northwest Oklahoma
Mobile banking app available on both Google Play and App Store
Internet Banking platform with FAQ resources
Combined 200+ years of banking experience among management team
cons: Limited geographic reach—only 4 branches in rural Oklahoma counties
Website lacks specific information about deposit rates, loan terms, APRs, or fees
No details provided about loan products, eligibility requirements, or competitive positioning
Minimal online service details; customers must call or visit branches for comprehensive information
No mention of investment products, wealth management, or advanced financial services

contact.address: 202 S Square St, Cleo Springs, OK 73729

best_for: Residents of Major and Alfalfa counties in Northwest Oklahoma seeking local banking relationships
Small business owners and individuals in rural Oklahoma communities
Customers who prioritize long-established, community-focused institutions over national banks
People who prefer in-person banking at local branch locations
diagnosis: Cleo State Bank is best suited for individuals and small business owners in Major and Alfalfa counties, Oklahoma, who value a community-focused, locally-owned bank with deep historical roots. The primary caveat is that the bank serves a limited geographic area with only 4 branches, making it inaccessible for customers outside Northwest Oklahoma, and the website provides minimal information about specific products, rates, and terms—requiring direct contact with branches for detailed service information.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 202 S Square St, Cleo Springs, OK 73729
